name: 简单机械
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 科学与技术 / Science & Technology / Science & Technology
curriculum_points: Students in PYP 3-5 will be able to identify and explore the six types of simple machines (lever, pulley, etc.), demonstrating how they make work easier by changing the force or direction of movement.
